results.term: Hello

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Hello

results.term: It's been tough.  I've been looking for a job for ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: It's been tough.  I've been looking for a job for months, but feel like I'm getting nowhere.

results.term: Well, I am fortunate to have a job, but I am seeki...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Well, I am fortunate to have a job, but I am seeking a different job because the one I have does not pay what my skills are worth.  It barely pays enough for me to pay my essential bills.

results.term: I have, but there are few decent jobs out there. M...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have, but there are few decent jobs out there. Most available jobs are in locations where one can not drive safely or their personal safety is at risk.

results.term: Last week, I submitted an application package for ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Last week, I submitted an application package for my dream job.  I have over 15 years of experience and the employer offers housing (which I have seen before, and it is quite nice).  I have heard nothing at all.

results.term: I would have to relocate 4 hours away, but I would...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I would have to relocate 4 hours away, but I would do it in a heartbeat for this job.

results.term: What makes this job so special to me is that it is...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: What makes this job so special to me is that it is not like a regular job:  it is at a conference center resort owned by my church denomination.  I have attended religious retreats there and am now in the process of seeking a new confirmation into this church because it is a different church than that of my childhood.

results.term: Working there would be ministry, not typical work....

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Working there would be ministry, not typical work.  And because the majority of staff and guests are from one of our sister churches, one is working mostly with friends and building long relationships.

results.term: Thank you.  I believe there are three things in my...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thank you.  I believe there are three things in my favor:  I know the job well, as I became friends with the person I would be replacing, My pastor wrote a glowing reference, and I was also able to get a reference from the person who trained me for my current (related) job fifteen years ago.

results.term: We worked together for almost 13 years before she ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: We worked together for almost 13 years before she retired, but who would be in a better position to assess my skill than my trainer/work partner?  I know a few of the higher ups from the area churches, and a handful of families.  I know half the core staff I would be working with daily and think of them as extended family.

results.term: The benefits are nice, also, such as staff are pro...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: The benefits are nice, also, such as staff are provided meals prepared by the banquet chef and his team when at work.

results.term: And though everyone has a role, the office staff s...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: And though everyone has a role, the office staff support each other well and work as a team.

results.term: At the risk of preaching religion, I believe God m...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: At the risk of preaching religion, I believe God may be calling me to serve there.

results.term: When off duty, staff are encouraged to enjoy the f...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: When off duty, staff are encouraged to enjoy the facilities and mingle with guests.  There is an Olympic sized pool, field games, a gymnasium, an exercise room, and if off duty, one can attend most any of the events on the campus, unless designated as a private event.

results.term: Because my job is to sell repeat business, it is e...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Because my job is to sell repeat business, it is essential that I get out and meet guests and make certain that their needs are met, but it usually comes in the form of serving snacks at intermission and saying hellos as one passes.  It would feel like a family reunion, but in a family where everyone gets along.

results.term: The music events year round are outstanding.  They...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: The music events year round are outstanding.  They have many well known names in Christian music as well as speakers who are well worth hearing.  To be able to hear these messages at no cost makes the job priceless.

results.term: As I said to my pastor, just to work somewhere whe...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: As I said to my pastor, just to work somewhere where people say thank you and ask how you are doing rather than criticize every move would be such a blessing.

results.term: And since I work nights already, I am more than ha...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: And since I work nights already, I am more than happy to cover the office overnight to attend to guests who have locked themselves out, or have other concerns.

results.term: I used to live on site at the motel where I work n...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I used to live on site at the motel where I work now, and on my days off, all I did was make keys and walk the grounds to ensure safety.

results.term: At this facility, there are beautiful benches to s...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: At this facility, there are beautiful benches to sit and watch the moon and stars and enjoy the sunrise or just take a moment.  There are covered gazebos and a couple buildings have deep covered porches for days when it's a bit rainy or the sun is strong.

results.term: And we're across the street from mountains and a r...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: And we're across the street from mountains and a river.  The campus is simply beautiful.

results.term: I pray you are right.  I feel as though I have bee...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I pray you are right.  I feel as though I have been running on a hamster wheel, but it has brought me to this.

results.term: Fifteen years of directly related experience, with...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Fifteen years of directly related experience, with about another 15 to 20 years of customer service, call center, and customer facing work.

results.term: Thank you.  I don't mind the work, but it would be...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thank you.  I don't mind the work, but it would be nice to also have appreciation,  that is what makes the current job difficult is that I feel taken for granted.

results.term: Thank you

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thank you

results.term: You too, thank you

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: You too, thank you
